strategy: Both of his cheat triggers are undocumented, so play a cautious standard setup and watch for reactions.
He is Balance with a Cadet Judge minion. AoE to clear the minion with him, or focus him down.
Stack blades and Feint, keep shields up, and keep healing and cleanse ready.
Funnel into one big hit; the 12,205 health falls to a solid funneled attack.
